languages.text: {n}Похоже, Тразин и не рассчитывал на вашу реакцию. Окинув Себериана последним взглядом, видение исчезает.{/n}
{n}It seems Trazyn never intended to wait for your reaction. After giving Seberian one last look, the vision fades away.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Похоже, Тразин и не рассчитывал на вашу реакцию. Окинув Себериана последним взглядом, видение исчезает.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}It seems Trazyn was never intending to wait for your reaction. After giving Seberian one last look, the vision fades away.{/n}
{n}It seems Trazyn never intended to wait for your reaction. After giving Seberian one last look, the vision fades away.{/n}
{n}It seems Trazyn did not anticipate this reaction. After giving Seberian one last look, the vision of the xenos fades away.{/n}
{n}It seems Trazyn was never intending to wait for your reaction. After giving Seberian one last look, the vision fades away.{/n}
{n}It seems Trazyn never intended to wait for your reaction. After giving Seberian one last look, the vision fades away.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Parece que Trazyn no tenía interés en esperar a tu reacción. Después de dedicar una última mirada a Seberian, la visión se desvanece.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It seems Trazyn never intended to wait for your reaction. After giving Seberian one last look, the vision fades away.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Parece que Trazyn no tenía interés en esperar a tu reacción. Después de dedicar una última mirada a Seberian, la visión se desvanece.{/n}

languages.text: {n}看来特拉金根本无意等待你的反应。他最后看了塞贝里安一眼，随后那影像便消失了。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It seems Trazyn never intended to wait for your reaction. After giving Seberian one last look, the vision fades away.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}看来特拉金根本无意等待你的反应。他最后看了塞贝里安一眼，随后那影像便消失了。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Il semble que Trazyn ne comptait pas attendre votre réaction. Après avoir jeté un dernier coup d'œil à Seberian, la vision s'évanouit.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It seems Trazyn never intended to wait for your reaction. After giving Seberian one last look, the vision fades away.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Il semble que Trazyn ne comptait pas attendre votre réaction. Après avoir jeté un dernier coup d'œil à Seberian, la vision s'évanouit.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Görünüşe göre Trazyn, hiçbir zaman tepki vermeni beklemeye niyetli değilmiş. Seberian'a son bir bakış attıktan sonra görü kaybolup gidiyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It seems Trazyn never intended to wait for your reaction. After giving Seberian one last look, the vision fades away.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Görünüşe göre Trazyn, hiçbir zaman tepki vermeni beklemeye niyetli değilmiş. Seberian'a son bir bakış attıktan sonra görü kaybolup gidiyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}トラズンはあなたの反応を待っていたつもりはなかったようだ。セベリアンを最後に見た後、幻は消えていく。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It seems Trazyn never intended to wait for your reaction. After giving Seberian one last look, the vision fades away.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}トラズンはあなたの反応を待っていたつもりはなかったようだ。セベリアンを最後に見た後、幻は消えていく。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Offenbar hatte Trazyn nie vor, deine Reaktion abzuwarten. Nach einem letzten Blick auf Seberian löst sich die Vision auf.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It seems Trazyn never intended to wait for your reaction. After giving Seberian one last look, the vision fades away.{/n}
